entry.title: New: CR 24-119 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 156, CD1 (2024), to prohibit retailers from: 1) selling or marketing flavored tobacco products, including products containing menthol and products that produce cooling sensations; and 2) mislabeling products as nicotine-free.

Water Authority, Social Services, and Parks Committee (2023-2025)

View on the council site
